reviews.comment:
Excelente Estación de Servicios en la zona. Perfecto para detenerse a cargar combustible, como así también a realizar diferentes compras necesarias para continuar un viaje por ejemplo. Posee excelente servicio de sanitarios y bufete, permite almorzar merendar o cenar con total comodidad, brinda medidas de seguridad y confort. Cuenta también con un Motel para descanso.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station in the area. Perfect for stopping to refuel, as well as for various purchases needed to continue a trip, for example. It has excellent restroom service and a buffet, allowing you to enjoy lunch, snacks, or dinner in total comfort, and offers safety and comfort measures. It also has a motel for rest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaExldWtnRRAB
